chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. D- 19 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.01.2026 For orders on MA 388/26 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 389/26 For hearing of main case Mr. Asif Ali Arain, Advocate along with applicants 1. Urgent granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicants Sheeraz Ali Khero, Ghulam Sugra, Sajjad Ali Dawach, Sheza, Ahmed Ali & Sanam are nominated as accused in NAB Reference No. 02 of 2023. Learned counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicants due to malafide intentions; and, that the applicants being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, they are apprehensive that before reaching trial court they might be arrested and subsequently humiliated and disgraced. They therefore seek legal shelter. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of ten days subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the amount of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousand) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case, the applicants fail to appear before the concerned court within the stipulated period the surety amount shall be forfeited. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of ten days i.e. 30.01.2026 or when the applicants surrender themselves before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
